title: Crunchyroll Streams Drops of God Anime's English Dub on Friday
content: Crunchyroll announced on Thursday that it will begin streaming an English dub for the television anime of Tadashi Agi and Shū Okimoto 's The Drops of God ( Kami no Shizuku ) manga on Friday.
author: ANN

title: HIDIVE Streams Farming Life in Another World 2 Anime's English Dub on May 1
content: The English dub cast — led by ADR Director John Swasey , ADR scriptwriter Marta Bechtol , English mixer Brent Marshall , and audio engineer Patrick Marrero — includes: • Blake Shepard as Hiraku • Luci Christian as Lu • Monica Rial as Tia • Shannon Emerick as Anne • Joe Daniels as Beezel • Kira Vincent-Davis as Bron •…
author: ANN

title: Netflix Confirms New Fantasy Anime Inspired By Legendary Creator
content: The renowned Japanese manga artist, animator, and producer, Osamu Tezuka , is often referred to as the “God of Manga” and the “Father of Anime.” He revolutionized the manga and anime industry with his captivating storytelling, expressive characters, and dynamic panel layouts.
author: ComicBook

title: Classic Anime Revival Unveils New Updates Ahead of 2026 Release
content: The anime and manga industry is heavily dominated by the Shonen demographic, and most of the mainstream series are purely battle action. Most of the best-selling manga of all time are also Shonen series, including One Piece, Naruto, Dragon Ball, Demon Slayer, and more.
author: ComicBook

title: 20th Anniversary Sgt. Frog Film's Trailer Unveils More Cast, Theme Song
content: The official website for Shin Gekijōban ☆ Keroro Gunsō Fukkatsu Shite Sokkō Chikyū Metsubō no Kiki de Arimasu! (New Sgt. Frog the Movie: The Earth Is in Mortal Peril as Soon as We Come Back!), the new 20th anniversary anime film project , unveiled the full trailer and visual for the film on Friday.
author: ANN

title: Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End Season 2’s Best Character Gets New Look After Finale
content: The latest Season 2 of Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End reached its conclusion last month, where the exciting journey of Frieren and her party continues after the First Class Mage Exam. The party travels to the dangerous Northern Plateau and encounters bigger threats than ever.
author: ComicBook

title: Netflix Confirms Major Streaming Update For The Most Iconic Detective Anime of All Time
content: The exciting Spring 2026 anime season is still ongoing, and it continues to bring several surprises in the anime world. Most of the new series are released in the first month of the quarter and end up on Crunchyroll, the largest streaming hub for anime fans worldwide.
author: ComicBook

title: Attack on Titan Confirms a Special Project With New Look At Eren
content: Based on the acclaimed manga by Hajime Isayama, the anime adaptation of Attack on Titan reached unprecedented heights of popularity ever since its debut in 2013. The series was initially adapted by WIT Studio and released the first three seasons of the anime.
author: ComicBook

title: 3 Anime That Changed Animation Studios & Were Better for It
content: Changing animation studios isn’t uncommon for anime , but it can prove a risky move — especially if viewers already like the current style, or if the new studio approaches the storytelling differently.
author: ComicBook

title: Creator Kawaisouni!'s Opanchu Usagi, Npochamu Characters Get 3D Anime
content: SKY Perfect Pictures revealed on Friday that creator Kawaisouni!'s Opanchu Usagi and Npochamu characters are getting a 3D anime adaptation under the title Kawaisouni! Theater ( Kawaisouni! Gekijō ), that will air within NTV 's morning program ZIP! . The staff also plan for the anime to stream globally.
author: ANN
